items.title: [CoderPush - Fullstack JS Developer_ AI Native - Remote - FT]
items.description:
**Location**
Remote-first (HN & HCM office optional)

**Salary Expectation**
Competitive (up to 70M Gross/month depending on experience)

**Requirements**

- 5+ years Fullstack (VueJS/React + NodeJS/TypeScript)
- Strong in software architecture (SOLID, Clean/Hexagonal)
- Database: MongoDB/Supabase, REST/RPC
- Experience with AI ecosystems (LangChain, LlamaIndex, RAG, prompt engineering)
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS/GCP, Kubernetes, serverless/PaaS solutions
- Good English communication (all rounds in English)

**Must Have**

- Solid coding fundamentals & clean architecture mindset
- Experience deploying scalable AI-integrated apps
- Ownership of code quality & system stability (high test coverage, CI/CD best practices)
- Collaborative & open to feedback

**Ideally**

- Knowledge of MLOps, AI model lifecycle, Groq hardware curiosity
- Experience with Supabase, ACID compliance & idempotency

- Responsibilities Building scalable, AI-native fullstack solutions
- Driving architecture decisions & system design
- Leveraging AI tools effectively for productivity
- Collaborating across product, UX, data science & engineering

**You can bring**

- Strong problem-solving & analytical mindset
- Passion for AI + software excellence
- Positive, collaborative attitude

**Why it would be awesome to work with us** 

- Remote-first environment 🌏
- Full insurance per VN Labor Laws
- Annual & performance-based bonus
- Equipment support + training/certification budget
- 22 paid leaves from 5th year (1 month off encouraged)
- Monthly coaching & career development
- Competitive salary & benefits package
- Innovative & collaborative team culture

**Interesting Engineering Projects**

- AI-powered back-office automation for SMEs
- Zero-downtime deployment with CI/CD best practices
- Scalable microservices architecture with AI integration
- High-standard testing pipelines for production stability

**Contact:**
Zalo: 0934440301 (Ms. Tram)

items.title: Sr. Software Engineer
items.description:
# Hiring experienced Sr. Software Engineers at Turing! 🚀  
Apply Here: http://turing.com/s/DWBRdK

Turing is one of the fastest-growing AI companies, pushing the boundaries of AI-assisted software development.  
In this role, you’ll review AI-generated code, rank solutions, and provide feedback to improve how Large Language Models (LLMs) learn real-world coding best practices.  

## We’re looking for professionals with:  
- 5+ years of software engineering experience, with 2 years as a full-stack engineer at a leading tech product company  
- Strong skills in code review, debugging, and software design  

## Role Details:  
- **Location:** Global (Remote, flexible 10/20/40 hrs/week)  
- **Work style:** Remote contract (flexible hours, partial PT overlap)  
- **Salary:** $50–$150/hr, depending on experience & geography  

👉 [Check out the full details](https://developers.turing.com/direct-apply/UiGLqtqqU30Y?&utm_source=ad&utm_medium=techmasters&utm_campaign=swe_100&utm_term=techmasters_discord)

items.title: DTalent's Client: CoderPush - Senior AI-Native Python Developer - Remote - FT
items.description:
# 🚀 We’re hiring: Senior AI-Native Python Developer 
**Location:** Remote (VN timezone)  
**Salary:** Up to 90M gross  

## About us
DTalent's Client - CoderPush is a remote-first team of 90+ engineers helping companies from startups to enterprises build high-quality software products.  
We value long-term partnerships, strong engineering culture, and continuous learning.

## Role
As a **Senior AI-Native Python Developer**, you’ll work at the intersection of **AI, automation, and cloud** to build production-ready solutions.

## Responsibilities
- Build AI-native systems using LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, LiteLLM, Semantic Kernel).  
- Design APIs with **FastAPI / NestJS**.  
- Develop automation pipelines for CI/CD & testing with LLMs.  
- Build scalable frontends (**React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS**).  
- Manage AWS infra (**Lambda, S3, RDS, Cognito, CloudWatch**).  

## Requirements
- 5+ years in **Python development** (AI/LLM applications).  
- Strong in **LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, agent frameworks**.  
- Proficient in **FastAPI, PostgreSQL (JSONB, full-text search)**.  
- Skilled in modern frontend (**React, TS, TailwindCSS**).  
- Experience with **AWS serverless, CI/CD, Docker, IaC**.  
- Good communication in **English + Vietnamese**.  

_Nice to have: RoR legacy, OAuth2, SaaS billing, OpenWebUI customization._  

## Benefits
- 🌍 Remote-first (work from anywhere)  
- 📅 Mon–Fri, 8h/day (VN timezone)  
- 🏖 22 paid leaves from 5th year  
- 💻 Work equipment support  
- 💰 Competitive salary + annual & performance bonuses  
- 🎓 Certification support & monthly coaching  
- 🏢 Optional office: Hanoi / HCMC  

## Hiring process
1. (Optional) Assessment  
2. Tech interview (live code)  
3. Client interview (1–2 rounds)  
4. Final with CP Founder + Offer  

_All rounds in English. Please ensure stable internet & camera._  

---

👉 Apply here: Tramcao@dtalent.vn

items.title: Remote Fulltime - Up to $5000Net - Lead Backend Engineer (AI)
items.description:
**Responsibilities**

- Architect and design scalable and maintainable backend systems and APIs
- Lead the development and implementation of backend features and functionalities
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions
- Mentor and guide junior backend engineers, fostering their technical growth and development
- Optimize backend performance, ensuring high availability, reliability, and security
- Integrate backend systems with external services and third-party APIs
- Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for backend systems and APIs
- Participate in code reviews, ensuring code quality, best practices, and adherence to coding standards
- Troubleshoot and debug complex backend issues, providing timely resolutions
- Contribute to the overall technical strategy and roadmap of the backend systems


**Technical Skills**

- Strong proficiency in server-side programming languages such as Golang, Python, or Node.js
- Expertise in designing and working with RESTful APIs and web services
- Solid understanding of database systems, including relational databases (e.g., 
- MySQL, PostgreSQL and NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, Cassandra), and proficiency in writing efficient and optimized database queries
- Knowledge of server infrastructure, scalability, and deployment processes
- Familiarity with containerization technologies like Docker, orchestration platforms like Kubernetes, and ability to work with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
- Experience with unit testing, integration testing, and API testing
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to debug complex systems
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment and proficiency in English

**Please send your CV via**: Quynh.Thuy.Tran@navigossearch.com
Or contact zalo/whatsapp: 0868272947

items.title: 🚀 Vaga Desenvolvedor(a) BackEnd Pleno – C# | JavaScript 🌟 📍 São Paulo - Barueri 🚀
items.description:
# Desenvolvedor(a) BackEnd Pleno – C# | JavaScript 🌟

- 📍 Localização: São Paulo - Barueri
- 📈 Nível: pleno
- 📃 Contrato: clt
- 💰 Salário: R$ 4.000,00 - R$ 5.000,00
- 🏃‍♂️ Corre para se candidatar, ainda dá tempo! 🕗


## Descrição da vaga:
Empresa de tecnologia que atua com inteligência artificial especializada em logística, oferecendo soluções para otimização e automação de operações, com foco em eficiência e sustentabilidade na cadeia de suprimentos. 🏢


## Atividades e responsabilidade:
• Desenvolver e implementar sistemas com C# e JavaScript
• Criar e consumir APIs RESTful
• Projetar e manter bancos de dados relacionais (ex: SQL Server)
• Contribuir com interfaces e funcionalidades web
• Garantir qualidade de código e entregas dentro dos prazos


## Requisitos:
✔ Experiência em C# e JavaScript
✔ Conhecimento em APIs RESTful e desenvolvimento web
✔ Vivência com bancos de dados relacionais
✔ Organização e autonomia no trabalho
✔ Boa comunicação com equipe e stakeholders
✔ Disponibilidade para trabalho 100% presencial em Alphaville


## Benefícios:
• Vale Refeição (R$ 30,00/dia) 
• Plano de saúde e odontológico sem custo
• Seguro de vida

## Mais Informações:
🔹 Experiência com ASP.NET Core
🔹 Conhecimento em metodologias ágeis
🔹 Capacidade de propor soluções criativas e escaláveis

items.title: Lean Analyst
items.description:
Apply @ rahul.g@laibatechnology.com

**Position: Lean Analyst

Location: Houston, TX (Onsite)**

Exp: 6-15 Yrs
Must have oil ang gas domain background
The Lean analyst will play a key role in driving process improvement projects by helping to facilitate and plan workshops with the Lean specialists and client team, analyzing and presenting pertinent data in the appropriate format, developing metrics and measurement tools to improve operating processes toward greater efficiency and effectiveness in all areas of oil and gas (upstream, downstream, chemicals, pipeline, etc.)

Track and record all relevant data for global Lean program, and refresh data for accuracy on monthly basis including but not limited to Lean Practitioner (LP) count, LP status, LP certification progress, yield rate, functional/job family representation, LP office location/geography, project tracking metrics, value tracking metrics, etc.

Analyze performance data/metrics, and develop appropriate presentations and dashboard tools to demonstrate Lean performance to client, including but not limited to SmartSheets, PowerBI, Tableau

Develop and build relevant process documents at the request of Lean specialists leveraging Visio, Mural, Zoom Whiteboard or Powerpoint

Construct and manage Microsoft SharePoint site for global Lean program and serve as site Admin to manage data storage, restricted access requests, subsite construction, etc.

Design, develop, and build HTML code using standard webpage design software (e.g. Figma) for professional Lean website


Apply @ rahul.g@laibatechnology.com

items.title: AI Solution Architect
items.description:
Apply to [rahul.g@laibatechnology.com](mailto:rahul.g@laibatechnology.com)


**Role - AI Solution Architect 
Location - Remote, USA - PST time zone
Contract role** 

The AI Solution Architect will be responsible for translating complex business challenges into viable, scalable, and secure AI/ML solutions. This role requires a deep understanding of AI/ML methodologies, data architectures, cloud platforms, and software engineering best practices. The successful candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, data scientists, ML engineers, software developers, and IT operations teams to architect, guide, and ensure the successful delivery of AI-powered products and services.

years of experience in solution architecture, with at least [Y+] years specifically focused on designing and implementing AI/ML solutions in an enterprise environment. Proven expertise in designing and deploying end-to-end machine learning pipelines. Strong understanding of various AI/ML techniques and algorithms (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning, deep learning, NLP, computer vision). Hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform's AI/ML services (AWS, Azure, GCP). Proficiency in programming languages commonly used in AI/ML (e.g., Python, R, Java). Familiarity with MLOps principles and tools for continuous integration, deployment, and monitoring of ML models. Solid understanding of data governance, data quality, and data security principles. Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and critical thinking skills. Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence and collaborate effectively across diverse teams. Preferred Qualifications: Experience with Generative AI models (LLMs, diffusion models) and related frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex). Experience with big data technologies (e.g., Spark, Hadoop, Kafka). Certifications in relevant cloud AI/ML platforms (e.g., AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty, Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer). Experience with agile development methodologies


Apply to [rahul.g@laibatechnology.com](mailto:rahul.g@laibatechnology.com)

items.title: Electrical Equipment Test Engineer
items.description:
APPLY on :    Email: **rahul.g@laibatechnology.com**


****Position: Heavy Equipment Test Engineer
Location: Erie, PA (Onsite role)
Full time / Permanent / Annual Salary**** 


Roles & Responsibilities:

Perform all tests with minimum supervision, involving knowledge of power and control electronics, difficult circuits, electrical measurements, electrical theory and calculations, testing operations and data acquisition. 
Develop, setup, and execute assigned tests
Attend and contribute to reviews with leads, engineering, EHS, and others when necessary to review, update, approve and perform proposed functionality tests or similar changes 
Attend necessary safety and qualification training for working on electrical and mechanical test stands.
Work on and communicate effectively with a cross functional team of technicians, engineers and Safety personnel
Provide technical expertise as needed to ensure test needs are met
Ensure all assigned tests are performed and documented properly
Attend test review/planning meetings as needed

Work Experience

Required Skills:

Associates degree in Electrical or Electronics Technology or a related technical discipline from an accredited university or college (Or a High School Diploma / GED with a minimum of 2 years of Military Technical Training or Electrical/Test experiences)
Hands on electrical troubleshooting capability and experience
Understanding and ability to work with complicated electrical schematics, verbal instructions, and / or drawings 
Test Documentation writing/development capability and experience 
Strong computer skills (Word, Excel, Office, PowerPoint)
Ability to meet physical / safety standards for heavy equipment test operations
Ability to work weekends and/or on a rotating shift


Desired Skills:

A minimum of 1 year of work experience in a heavy equipment test related field
Knowledge of AC / DC theory, Digital Electronics, 3 phase power, electric motor mechanics, electric motor theory (AC/DC), rotating machinery testing, electrical and mechanical test instrumentation, and troubleshooting electrical, mechanical, and hydraulic systems
Knowledge and/or training on Pneumatic Systems
Ability to properly use and care for assigned tools and equipment
Ability to adhere to standards and do a quality job in a safe and timely manner
Ability to promote climate of cooperation, such as; leading by example mentoring others in Quality, Safety, Environmental, and Lean philosophies
Ability to rotate through all or most of the processes, rather than being assigned to a specific task
Ability to work as part of a team and perform all related duties
 

Physical Requirements & Work Environment:

Mostly heavy industrial test environment with work on high HP (1000 KVA), medium voltage (2 KV) and high current (10 KA) systems and heavy mechanical machinery.
Frequent requirement to lift up to 50 lbs., frequently required to walk, climb, bend, reach outward, and handle materials and tools. Occasionally required to sit, squat and/or kneel.
While performing duties on this job, the employee is exposed to wet or hot, humid conditions (non-weather); work near moving mechanical parts and vibration. The noise level is usually loud. The vision requirements include: close vision, distance vision, peripheral vision, depth perception and ability to adjust focus.
Substantial amounts of telephone and computer work.
Heavily Regulated Industries with strict adherence to procedures.
Flexibility to meet business deadlines by staying late or arriving early.
Varied Work Schedule to meet equipment delivery schedules. Weekend and rotating shift work.
Ability to use personal transportation to visit customer locations.


Email: rahul.g@laibatechnology.com

items.title: [徵才][台北] [AI 新創公司] [遠端為主] Senior Frontend and Backend Engineer 100w~140w
items.description:
## 【AHEAD 先勁智能】正在尋找資深後端工程師。

  薪資： 年薪 NT$ 1,000,000 - NT$ 1,400,000

## 歡迎投遞履歷
- 資深後端工程師: https://www.104.com.tw/job/8sezr

## 公司簡介 | AHEAD 官方網站
AHEAD 整合了臨床醫師、轉譯醫學、資料科學、機器學習及軟體開發等多領域專家，致力於開發有效的 AI 輔助診斷工具。首發產品「Cyto-copilot 雲端智能平台」專為血液癌症專業判讀需求而設計。
- AHEAD 官方網站 | Official Website
https://www.aheadmedicine.com/

## 媒體曝光
•	[2024台灣AI大賞｜7秒鐘找出異常細胞！先勁智能用AI加持判讀，成果登入聖經教科書](https://www.bnext.com.tw/article/79724/ahead-medicine--taiwan-impact-ai-award-2024)
•	[環球生技 116期焦點企業專訪: 先勁智能AI血癌檢驗平台寫下經典教科書](https://news.gbimonthly.com/tw/magazine/article_show.php?num=68041&menu=1479&p_id=124&fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAAR3rTrsPUmfpSYuasKVsCSAxtCF_8XBTlpZJ-FBnPG52IPt7W4_QYmc7Flg_aem_m8EsExRlk78dGDuflMfmtA)
•	[DIGITIMES AHEAD打造全面性AI臨床輔助系統](https://www.digitimes.com.tw/iot/article.asp?cat=158&id=0000572899_oqe7yvp3lapxh081lo4yc&fbclid=iwar2gyu05tgzc0obtt4ez6t88ox5yxwbjvpxb8dhappckwzzawx1uq8ttdpu)
•	[Meet Global AHEAD Intelligence uses AI to help doctors conquer blood cancer, skyrocket the speed of diagnostics 100 times faster](https://meet-global.bnext.com.tw/articles/view/47385)

## 公司福利
- 混合居家辦公(Hybrid Remote)：每週僅需進辦公室1-2次參與會議
- 員工認股權計畫
- 休假制度優於勞基法(額外三天幸福假)
- 現磨咖啡機提供，咖啡暢飲 充足供應的零食與飲料
- 不定期提供水果、甜點
- 定期團隊聚餐活動
- 教育訓練補助

## 建議準備事項
- 準備作品集或可分享的開源專案
- 熟悉自己過往專案的技術細節
- 了解我們公司的產品與技術棧
- 準備關於團隊合作的具體案例

items.title: 🚀 Vaga Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack Presencial Região de São Paulo/Capital ou Rio de Janeiro 🎯 📍 Presencial 🚀
items.description:
# Desenvolvedor(a) Fullstack Presencial Região de São Paulo/Capital ou Rio de Janeiro 🎯

- 📍 Localização: Presencial
- 📈 Nível: pleno
- 📃 Contrato: clt
- 💰 Salário: R$ 9.500,00
- 🏃‍♂️ Corre para se candidatar, ainda dá tempo! 🕗


## Descrição da vaga:
Estamos em busca de uma pessoa desenvolvedora Full Stack que domine front e back-end, escreva código limpo e escalável, e contribua com ideias e boas práticas em projetos desafiadores. 🌟






## Requisitos:
Formação em Engenharia da Computação, Ciências da Computação ou áreas correlatas. 
Mínimo de 3 anos de experiência com desenvolvimento Full Stack (Front e Back-end). 
Conhecimento avançado em: JavaScript, ReactJS, NodeJS, Testes unitários com JEST, TypeScript, Angular, NoSQL e bancos de dados relacionais (SQL), Versionamento com Git, Experiência com metodologias ágeis (Scrum, Kanban, ITIL). 
Proatividade, atenção aos detalhes e capacidade de colaborar em equipe. ✅


## Benefícios:
Plano de saúde Nacional completo (Não precisa de coparticipação);  
Plano dentário Nacional completo (mesma regra do plano de saúde);  
Vale alimentação ou refeição no valor de R$714 mensais (pela empresa ticket);  
Auxílio transporte em caso de deslocamento a um local de trabalho.

## Mais Informações:
Se você busca crescer em um ambiente inovador, com projetos relevantes e espaço para contribuir ativamente, essa vaga é para você! 📩


# [🔗 Clique aqui para se candidatar](https://empregos.dev/vaga/desenvolvedora-fullstack-presencial-regiao-de-sao-paulo-capital-ou-rio-de-janeiro-9117)


**Use nosso site [Empregos.dev](https://empregos.dev) para buscar mais vagas de trabalho na área da programação, desenvolvimento, devops e tecnologia como está!**

items.title: [FIRST DECISION] Cientista de Dados Sênior
items.description: A First Decision, consultoria especializada em tecnologia e migração de Dados está com uma oportunidade de Cientista de Dados Sênior. Modalidade: 100% Home Office Contratação: CLT Remuneração: R$ Informada no ato da inscrição Responsabilidades: Desenvolver, analisar, modelar, implementar e avaliar soluções para problemas de negócios, tanto complexos quanto simples, utilizando técnicas estatísticas, matemáticas e computacionais aplicadas ao processamento e visualização de dados. Atuar em colaboração com o time, compartilhando conhecimento e experiências, sempre com foco na necessidade do cliente. Conhecimentos Técnicos Obrigatórios: Experiência comprovada com bancos de dados PostgreSQL e MySQL Domínio da linguagem Python Experiência com frameworks e bibliotecas Python: Langchain, LangGraph, Pandas, NumPy, OpenAI API Capacidade de assimilar e implementar modelos inovadores para a ciência de dados Processamento de linguagem natural (NLP) Familiaridade com LLMs (Linguistic Language Models), com destaque para GPT Capacidade de manipular e analisar dados estruturados e não estruturados Bom conhecimento de ambientes Linux e Shell Script Familiaridade com Docker e Docker-Compose Familiaridade com GitLab Familiaridade com Solr ou algum banco NoSQL Conhecimentos Técnicos Desejáveis: Experiência com algoritmos de processamento de linguagem natural Experiência em sistemas de recomendação Experiência com Solr Familiaridade com Nginx Familiaridade com Grafana Familiaridade com Prometheus Experiência com algoritmos de redes neurais profundas Compreensão de LLMs (Linguistic Language Models) Conhecimento da aplicação prática do SCRUM Formação: Possuir diploma de ensino superior completo nas seguintes áreas de conhecimento (e suas subáreas), de acordo com a classificação da CAPES da plataforma Sucupira: Matemática (10100008). Probabilidade e Estatística (10200002). Ciência da Computação (10300007). Engenharias (30000009). Economia (60300000). Outra área com ênfase substancial em análise de dados Candidate- se pelo link: https://jobs.recrutei.com.br/first-decision/vacancy/104544-cientista-de-dados-senior ou envie o seu currículo para o e-mail: ingrid.brandao@firstdecision.com.br ( Informe o meio de divulgação que encontrou a vaga, por gentileza)

items.title: [First Decision] Desenvolvedor PHP Sênior
items.description: A First Decision, consultoria especializada em tecnologia e migração de Dados está com uma oportunidade para Desenvolvedor PHP Sênior. Modalidade: Híbrido em Brasília - DF Contratação: CLT Remuneração: R$ Informada no ato da inscrição Estamos em busca de um talentoso desenvolvedor com experiência em PHP Back Symfony para integrar nossa equipe na Advocacia Geral da união - AGU. O candidato ideal será responsável por projetar, implementar e manter aplicações web eficientes e escaláveis, utilizando as tecnologias mencionadas. Além disso, espera-se que o profissional colabore com outros membros da equipe para entregar soluções de alta qualidade. Responsabilidades: Projetar, desenvolver e manter aplicações back-end robustas e eficientes utilizando PHP e o framework Symfony. Implementar lógica de negócios, manipulação de dados e integração de sistemas. Contribuir para a definição e manutenção da arquitetura de software, garantindo escalabilidade, desempenho e modularidade. Identificar e corrigir gargalos de desempenho, realizar otimizações de código e implementar boas práticas para garantir eficiência. Integrar sistemas e serviços de terceiros de forma eficiente, garantindo a interoperabilidade. Realizar manutenção contínua do código, resolver bugs e aplicar melhorias conforme necessário. Participar ativamente de revisões de código para garantir a qualidade e aderência às diretrizes da equipe. Requisitos: Graduação em curso de nível superior na área de Tecnologia da Informação, ou especialização, mestrado ou doutorado na área de Tecnologia da Informação; Trabalho será realizado de forma home officer Proficiência em PHP e conhecimento avançado em Symfony. Experiência com arquitetura MVC (Model-View-Controller). Conhecimento sólido em banco de dados, preferencialmente MySQL ou outro sistema de gerenciamento de banco de dados relacional. Orientação a objetos (Consolidado) Familiaridade com o uso de Doctrine ORM (Object-Relational Mapping) no contexto do Symfony. Experiência em desenvolvimento de aplicações web e serviços RESTful. Conhecimento em tecnologias web como HTML, CSS, JavaScript/jQuery. Uso de ferramentas de controle de versão, como Git. Experiência em práticas de teste, incluindo testes unitários e testes de integração. Conhecimento de ferramentas de teste, como PHPUnit. Compromisso com a escrita de código limpo e boas práticas de desenvolvimento. Capacidade de trabalhar em equipe e receber feedback construtivo; Boa comunicação e habilidades de trabalho em equipe. Diferenciais: Familiaridade com sistemas de gerenciamento de dependências, como Composer. Experiência em configuração e implantação de aplicativos Symfony. Compreensão de práticas de segurança web. Candidate- se pelo link: https://jobs.recrutei.com.br/first-decision/vacancy/109777-agu-desenvolvedor-senior-php ou envie o seu currículo para o e-mail: ingrid.brandao@firstdecision.com.br (Informe o meio de divulgação que encontrou a vaga, por gentileza)

items.title: Remote/Hybrid - Senior AI Engineer - Up to $4000 Gross
items.description:
**About the Role**

We’re looking for a Senior AI Engineer to lead the development and optimization of generative AI features across both research and production. You’ll work closely with our Head of AI to improve model quality, streamline pipelines, and launch features that reach real users. This is a high-impact role with significant ownership and autonomy.

**What You’ll Do**

●	Lead the development of new AI-powered features from concept to production
●	Build and optimize training pipelines and inference systems
●	Design and implement benchmarks to measure and improve model performance
●	Collaborate with researchers to bring cutting-edge models into production
●	Mentor junior engineers and guide architectural decisions
●	Drive speed, scalability, and reliability across our AI systems

**Requirements**

●	5+ years of experience in production ML, with a focus on computer vision or image generation
●	Expert-level proficiency in PyTorch and large-scale ML infrastructure
●	Experience with diffusion models, GANs, or modern generative architectures
●	Proven track record optimizing models for quality, speed, and cost
●	Strong quantitative and benchmarking skills
●	Bachelor’s or Master’s in CS, AI, or related field
●	Must be based in Vietnam + Fluent in English

**Bonus Points**

●	Experience shipping AI features in creative or design tools
●	Published research in top conferences (e.g., CVPR, ICCV, NeurIPS)
●	Proven ability to translate academic research into production systems
●	Strong systems design and architecture experience

**Contact point:**
Zalo/Whatsapp: +84 868272947
Email: Quynh.Thuy.Tran@navigossearch.com
